message: I've been thinking about how summer heat can sneak up on us—it's easy to assume we'll just be fine, but a little prep actually makes a real difference. I found this solid resource from Ready.gov that walks through the practical stuff: what to keep on hand, how to spot heat exhaustion, ways to stay cool when AC isn't an option. Nothing scary, just... useful. What's your go-to way to beat the heat at home?
